description: A returning customer is checking out and wants to use their credit card that is already saved to their account.

nodes.task_description: Log into their account and proceed to checkout.

expected_outcome.value: The customer is authenticated and ready to pay.

nodes.task_description: On the payment page, select their saved credit card from the list of payment options.

expected_outcome.value: The customer chooses their stored payment method instead of re-entering the details.
The order is placed successfully using the tokenized, saved payment information.
